role_desc_king_of_lions: Yirtqichlar lideri sifatida maqsadingiz podani yeyish. Har kecha bitta o'ljani g'ajib tashlashni tanlaysiz.
role_desc_alpha_lion: Har kecha bitta odamni o'zingiznikiga og'dirib sherga aylantirishingiz mumkin.
role_desc_apex_vulture: Kechasi o'yinchilarni tekshirib, kimligini bilib yirtqichlaringizga xabar berasiz.
role_desc_wise_owl: Har kecha bitta hayvonni tekshirib aslini aniqlab olasiz.
role_desc_fledgling_owl: Kechasi ikkita hayvonni solishtirib, ular bitta to'dadanmi yo'qmi bilasiz.
role_desc_rabbit_witch: Sizda ikkita dori bor: biri hujumga uchraganni qutqaradi, ikkinchisi xohlagan odamingizni zaharlab o'ldiradi.
role_desc_rhino_hunter: Agar sizni o'ldirishsa, qotilingizni ham o'zingiz bilan opketasiz.
role_desc_common_sheep: Sizda zo'r qobiliyat yo'q, lekin kunduzgi ovoz berishingiz tirik qolish uchun muhim.
role_desc_playing_possum: Sizning yagona maqsadingiz — hammaga o'zingizni kunduzi osishlariga majbur qilish.
role_desc_hypnotic_serpent: Tunda o'yinchilarni bo'ysundirasiz. Zombi bo'lgach, ularni o'zingiz uchun o'ldirishga majburlashingiz mumkin.
role_desc_venomous_snake: Bir odamni zaharlaysiz. Agar tuzalmasa ikki tunda o'ladi.
role_desc_ghostly_dog: O'lganingizdan keyin ham bir o'yinchini hujumdan asrab qola olasiz.
role_desc_crazy_chemist_toad: Kechasi dorilar bilan o'ynashasiz. Nishonni o'ldirib qo'yishingiz ham mumkin, yo'qsa tasodifan o'zingiz zahar ichib qo'yasiz!
role_desc_cursed_sheep: Agar sherlar hujum qilsa o'lmaysiz, balki ularning safiga sher bo'lib o'tasiz.
role_desc_disguised_lion: Tekshirganda oddiy qo'ydek ko'rinasiz, lekin Yirtqichlar uchun odam o'ldirasiz.
night_fledgling_choose_second: Solishtirish uchun endi ikkinchi o'yinchini tanlang:
night_rhino_choose: Agar hujum qilishsa kimdan qasos olishni tanlang:
night_on_cooldown: ⏳ Sizning qobiliyatingiz hozir dam olyapti. Bugun uxlang.

settings_saved_default: ✅ Saqlandi! Avtomat tarzda balansli rollar tushadi.
settings_mismatch_fewer: ⚠️ Rollar {0} taga qo'yilgan, lekin faqat {1} ta o'yinchi bor. Ba'zi rollar avtomatik olib tashlandi.
settings_mismatch_more: ℹ️ {1} ta o'yinchi uchun {0} ta rol qo'yildi. Qolgan {2} ta joy default rollar bilan to'ladi.
settings_unauthorized_group: 🚫 Bu guruh uchun nastroykalarni o'zgartirishga huquqingiz yo'q.
settings_main_title:
⚙️ **O'yin sozlamalar**

Bu guruh uchun o'yinni sozlang:
settings_lang_title:
🌐 **Tilni tanlash**

Bu guruh uchun tilni tanlang:
settings_botfiller_title:
🤖 **Bot sozlamalari**

O'yinda botlarning o'zini qanday tutishini sozlang:
settings_role_desc: Keyingi o'yinga qaysi rollar chiqishini sozlang.
settings_no_roles: ℹ️ Hech qanday rol sozlanmagan — shuning uchun avtomatik balans ishlaydi.
settings_group_not_found: Guruh topilmadi. Oldin /start bilan o'yin oching.
cmd_start_private: O'yinni boshlash uchun bu buyruqni guruhda ishlating.
start_cancel_not_enough: 🛑 O'yin bekor qilindi! Odam yetarli emas (kamida 5 ta kerak, bizda {0} ta).
start_lobby_closed: 🦁 Yig'ilish tugadi! Endi o'yinchilarga rollar tarqatilyapti...
start_lobby_started:
Yig'ilish boshlandi!
Guruh muvaffaqiyatli ro'yxatdan o'tdi!

O'yinchilar:
start_must_be_member: Siz bu guruh a'zosi bo'lishingiz kerak.
night_peaceful: Tun tinch o'tdi. Hech kim o'lmadi.
flee_no_game: ❌ Bu yerda hech qanaqa o'yin bo'lmayapti.
flee_already_dead: 💀 Shundoq ham o'lgansiz. Narigi dunyodan qochib ketolmaysiz.
settings_timer_title:
⏱️ **Taymer sozlamalar**

Har bir faza qancha davom etishini soniyada kiriting:
role_desc_sneaky_raccoon: Kechasi boshqa o'yinchining rolini o'g'irlab olasiz. Agar To'liq O'g'ri rejimi o'chirilgan bo'lsa, u odam Oddiy Qo'yga aylanadi. Agar yoqilgan bo'lsa, sizda 50% imkoniyat bo'ladi, agar o'xshasa u yangi O'g'ri bo'ladi!
settings_thief_title:
🦝 **O'g'ri (Ayyor Yenot) Nastroykasi**

O'g'ri rolini qanday ishlashini sozlang:
about_text_2: Open source jamoasi tomonidan ❤️ bilan qilingan.
role_desc_chunky_mongoose: Sizga Gipnozchi Ilonning ta'siri umuman o'tmaydi. Agar sizni gipnoz qilmoqchi bo'lsa, kallasini g'ajib tashlaysiz!
role_desc_quilled_porcupine: Sizda 2 ta o'q bor. Kunduzgi muhokamada siz xohlagan o'yinchini shu joyning o'zidayoq otib tashlashingiz mumkin. O'qlarni aqlli ishlating!
engine_night_gunner_retaliate: 💥 Tunda Yirtqichlar {0}ga tashlandi... lekin u tayyor turgan ekan. {0} o'zini himoya qilib, qurolini otdi va {1}ni qulatdi!
engine_draw_solo_death: 💀 Hech qanday maqsadsiz, {0} yo'q bo'lib ketdi...
role_desc_roaring_hippopotamus: Boshida hammaga o'xshab oddiy qatnashasiz. Kunduzgi fazada o'z rolingizni ochiq aytib yuborishingiz mumkin. Shundan so'ng ovozingiz 2 taga o'tadi!
mayor_reveal_prompt: 🎖 **Kunduzgi faza:** Siz Baqiroq Begemotsiz (Mer). O'zingizni oshkor qilib, o'yin oxirigacha ovozingizni 2 baravar kuchli qila olasiz.
mayor_reveal_success: ✅ O'zingizni oshkor qildingiz! Endi ovozingiz har doim ikkitaga yuradi.
mayor_reveal_announce: 📢 **Baqiroq Begemot** {0} o'zini oshkor qildi! Uning ovozi endi 2 taga o'tadi.
role_desc_peaceful_manatee: O'yin davomida 1 marta kunduzi o'sha kungi haydashni bekor qila olasiz. O'sha kuni hech kim o'lmaydi, lekin kimligingiz ochilib qoladi.
pacifist_prompt: ☮️ **Kunduzgi faza:** Siz Tinchliksevar Lamantinsiz (Pasifist). Bugungi haydashni to'xtatish uchun kuchingiz bor. Faqat 1 marta ishlaydi va rolingizni oshkor qiladi.
pacifist_success: ✅ Bugungi haydashni to'xtatdingiz! Rolingiz oshkor bo'ldi.
pacifist_announce: ☮️ **{0}** oldinga chiqib tinchlik haqida ajoyib gapirdi. Qishloq shunchalik ta'sirlandiki, bugun hech kimni osmaslikka qaror qildi. {0}ning **Tinchliksevar Lamantin** ekanligi aniq bo'ldi!
pacifist_no_lynch: ☮️ Tinchliksevar Lamantinning gapi o'tdi. Bugun hech kim haydalmaydi.
ability_type_chemistgamble: Tavakkal (Zahar nishonga tegishi yo o'zini o'ldirishi)
ability_type_mayorreveal: Oshkor qilish (Ikki marta ovoz berish uchun ochilish)
role_desc_lone_jaguar: Siz yolg'iz qotilsiz. Har kecha bitta odamni g'ajib tashlaysiz. Agar oxirigacha tirik qolsangiz yutasiz. Yirtqichlar sizni o'ldirolmaydi; agar harakat qilsa siz ularni yeysiz. Sizni og'dirib ham bo'lmaydi.
engine_night_sk_reverse_kill: 🐆 Kimdir Yolg'iz Yaguarga tashlanmoqchi bo'ldi... lekin Yaguar tayyor edi, o'rniga uning o'zini dabdala qildi!
engine_night_sk_kill: 🐆 Yolg'iz Yaguar tunda o'ziga yana bitta qurbon topdi.
engine_night_chemist_gamble_sk: 🧪 Ximik Yolg'iz Yaguarga zahar ichirmoqchi bo'lgandi, lekin gapini tugatmasidanoq pichoqlandi!
engine_sk_overpower: 🐆 Faqat {0} (Yolg'iz Yaguar) va {1} qoldi... Yaguar osongina oxirgi o'ljasini majag'lab, g'alabani tortib oldi!
engine_draw_sk_hunter: 💥 Faqat {0} (Yolg'iz Yaguar) va {1} (Ovchi) qoldi... Ular bir-biriga shunday tashlandiki, ikkisi ham o'ldi. Durang!
ability_type_serialkillerkill: Qotillik (Har tun bittani o'ldiradi, yolg'iz yutadi)
role_desc_two_faced_jackal:
Ikkiyuzlamachi Shoqol 🖕

Boshida Oddiy Podadan biri bo'lasiz. Ular bilan yutasiz... faqat barcha Yirtqichlar o'lib ketmaguncha. Agar oxirgi Yirtqich o'lsa, asl qiyofangiz ochiladi! Siz Sherlar Qiroliga aylanib ketasiz va podadan qasos olasiz.

Strategiya: O'zingizni fosh qilmang. Yirtqichlarni himoya qilib, lekin hech kimga bildirmang.
engine_traitor_transforms: 🦁 Oxirgi Yirtqich o'ldi, lekin hali hammasi tugamadi! {0} asl basharasini ko'rsatib Sherlar Qiroliga aylanib ketdi!
🦁 Hamma yirtqichlar o'lganini nishonlayotganda, {0} yoqimsiz kula boshladi... U Ikkiyuzlamachi Shoqol edi, endi shou boshlanadi!
🦁 O'lgan yirtqichlarning qoni {0}ning qonini qaynatdi... U endi qasos olish uchun Sherlar Qiroliga aylandi!
dm_traitor_transforms: 🦁 Oxirgi Yirtqich ham o'ldi... Sizning qoningiz qaynadi! Ichingizdagi hayvon uyg'ondi. Siz endi Sherlar Qirolisiz! Podani dabdala qilib, qasos oling!
dm_traitor_intro: Siz Ikkiyuzlamachi Shoqolsiz. O'zingizni oddiy odamdek ko'rsatib, ular bilan ovoz bering. Lekin agar hamma Yirtqichlar o'lsa, siz ham ulardan biriga aylanasiz. Yirtqichlar yutishi uchun qo'lingizdan kelganini qiling!
role_desc_matchmaking_dove:
Siz Sovchi Kabutarsiz! 🕊️

Birinchi kechada ikkita o'yinchini Sevishganlar qilib bog'laysiz. Endi ularning taqdiri bitta bo'ladi. Biri o'lsa, ikkinchisi ham qayg'udan o'lib ketadi!

Sevishganlar yutishi uchun o'yin oxirida faqato'zlarigina tirik qolishlari kerak. Ehtiyot bo'lib tanlang, o'zingizni ham bog'lab qo'yishingiz mumkin!
dm_dove_intro: Siz Sovchi Kabutarsiz. Bugun kechasi ikkita o'yinchini tanlab ularni bir-biriga bog'laysiz. Yaxshilab tanlang, endi ularning taqdiri bir!
dm_dove_lover_notify: 💕 Siz endi {0} bilan sevishganlarsiz! Taqdiringiz bitta. Agar u o'lsa, yuragingiz yorilib o'lasiz. Siz va sevgilingiz o'yin oxirigacha birga tirik qolsangizgina yutasiz!
engine_dove_linked: 🕊️ Siz {0} va {1}ni bog'ladingiz. Ularning taqdiri endi bitta!
engine_dove_linked_public: 🕊️ Qorong'ilikda ikkita yurak yashirin sevgi bilan bog'landi...
engine_lover_died: 💔 {0} sevgilisidan ayrilganiga chiday olmadi va qayg'udan o'lib ketdi!
dm_lover_died: 💔 Sevgilingiz o'ldi! Bunga dosh berolmadingiz... Yuragingiz yorilib narigi dunyoga ketdingiz.
engine_lovers_win: 💕 Hammaga qarshi chiqib {0} va {1} tirik qoldi! Ularning taqiqlangan sevgisi g'alaba qozondi! Sevishganlar yutdi!
ability_type_linklovers: Sevishganlarni Bog'lash (Ikkita odamni bitta qilib bog'lash)
role_desc_blindfolded_kangaroo: O'yinda bir marta, kunduzi bitta tasodifiy Yirtqichni ko'zini boylab qo'yishingiz mumkin. Uning tungi nishonlari almashtirib tashlanadi!
kangaroo_prompt: 🦘 **Kunduzgi faza:** Siz Ko'zi Bog'langan Kengurusiz. Bugun bitta tasodifiy Yirtqichni ko'zini ko'r qilib qo'yishni xohlaysizmi?
kangaroo_activated: ✅ Qobiliyat ishlatildi! Bitta tasodifiy Yirtqich ko'r qilindi.
kangaroo_error: Buni hozir qilolmaysiz yoki allaqachon ishlatgansiz.
kangaroo_no_apex: Yirtqichni ko'r qilmoqchi bo'ldiz, lekin tirik Yirtqich qolmagan!
kangaroo_announce: 🦘 **{0}** o'zining **Ko'zi Bog'langan Kenguru** ekanligini fosh qilib havoga chang ko'tardi, bitta Yirtqichni ko'r qildi!
night_choose_retaliate: Hujum qilishsa kimdan qasos olishni tanlang:
night_choose_steal: 🦝 Rolini urib ketish uchun kimnidir tanlang:
dove_choose_second_lover:
✅ Birinchi sevishgan: **{0}**
Endi ularni bog'lash uchun ikkinchisini tanlang:
fledgling_first_target:
✅ Birinchi nishon: **{0}**
Solishtirish uchun ikkinchi o'yinchini tanlang:
gunner_shot_edit: {0} ni otdingiz! Sizda {1} ta o'q qoldi.
gunner_announce: 💥 **GUMB-BUMB!** Tikanli Jayra {0} hammamizni ko'z o'ngimizda {1}ni otib tashladi!
dm_killed_serpent_cascade: o'ldi va sizni ham o'zi bilan tortib ketdi!
dm_killed_serpent_investigate: siz uni tekshirganingizda gipnoz qilib o'ldirdi!
dm_killed_retaliate_action: unga hujum qilganingiz uchun sizdan qasos oldi!
dm_killed_jk_reverse: unga hujum qilmoqchi bo'lganingizda sizni kutib olib o'ldirdi!
dm_killed_jk_reverse_infect: uni kasallamoqchi bo'lganingizda yomon poylab turgan ekan!
dm_killed_porcupine_action: o'zini himoya qilib sizni otib tashladi!
help_group_prompt: Qo'llanmani o'zingiz xohlagan tilda o'qish uchun pastdagi tugmani bosing.
start_helper_welcome: Wereanimals-ga xush kelibsiz! Boshlash uchun quyidagi variantni tanlang:
start_helper_help_text: Wereanimals - bu ijtimoiy chegirma o'yini. Qanday o'ynashni o'rganish uchun quyidagi qo'llanmani o'qing.
start_helper_roles_title: Bu erda barcha mavjud rollar ro'yxati:
settings_roles_reveal_title: 👁 **O‘limdagi rolni ochish**\nAgar faollashtirilgan bo‘lsa, o‘yinchi vafot etganida uning nomi yonida rol nomi ko‘rsatiladi.
engine_player_replaced_bot: 🤖 {0} soatda uxlab qoldi! Poda o'ynashda davom etishi uchun miyasini sun'iy intellektga ulagan.
🤖 {0} haqiqatdan uzilgan. Bir oz soqov, ammo g'ayratli bot ularning tanasini egallab oldi.
🤖 {0} ishda uxlab yotganida qo‘lga olindi! Ularning harakatlanishi uchun ularning bosh suyagiga avtopilot chipi o‘rnatilgan.
flee_disabled: ❌ Qochish hozirda administrator tomonidan oʻchirib qoʻyilgan. Siz bu yerda biz bilan birgasiz.
settings_game_title:
⚙️ **Game Settings**

Configure gameplay rules for this lobby.
ach_first_blood_desc: Play your very first game of Wereanimal.
ach_loss_streak_5_desc: Lose 5 games in a row. It happens to the best of us.
ach_herd_champ_10_desc: Win 10 times as a member of The Herd.
ach_apex_champ_10_desc: Win 10 times as a member of The Apex.
ach_first_die_desc: Be the first person to die in a game.
ach_first_die_5_desc: Be the first person to die in 5 different games.
ach_survivor_10_desc: Survive until the end of the game 10 times.
ach_guardian_5_desc: Successfully protect someone from a night attack 5 times.
ach_investigator_10_desc: Successfully investigate or compare players 10 times.
ach_infector_5_desc: Successfully infect 5 players as the Alpha Lion.
ach_sheep_mentality_desc: Cast 50 votes during the day phase.
ach_possum_prank_desc: Trick the village into voting you out as the Playing Possum and win.
ach_broken_heart_desc: Die of a broken heart because your lover died.
ach_love_conquers_desc: Win the game as a Lover.
ach_traitor_reveal_desc: Transform into a Lion as the Two-Faced Jackal.
ach_traitor_win_desc: Win the game after transforming into a Lion as the Two-Faced Jackal.
ach_clean_sweep_desc: Win a game with The Herd where zero Herd members die.
ach_diversity_desc: Win the game using 10 different roles.
ach_herd_champ_1_desc: Win a game as a member of The Herd.
ach_apex_champ_1_desc: Win a game as a member of The Apex.
ach_solo_champ_1_desc: Win a game as a Solitary.
ach_assassin_1_desc: Get your first confirmed night kill.
ach_guardian_1_desc: Successfully protect someone from a night attack.
ach_guardian_10_desc: Successfully protect someone from a night attack 10 times.
ach_guardian_25_desc: Successfully protect someone from a night attack 25 times.
ach_guardian_50_desc: Successfully protect someone from a night attack 50 times.
ach_investigator_1_desc: Successfully investigate or compare players for the first time.
ach_investigator_25_desc: Successfully investigate or compare players 25 times.
ach_investigator_50_desc: Successfully investigate or compare players 50 times.
ach_investigator_100_desc: Successfully investigate or compare players 100 times.
ach_infector_1_desc: Successfully infect a player as the Alpha Lion.
ach_infector_10_desc: Successfully infect 10 players as the Alpha Lion.
ach_infector_25_desc: Successfully infect 25 players as the Alpha Lion.
ach_infector_50_desc: Successfully infect 50 players as the Alpha Lion.
ach_sheep_mentality_10_desc: Cast 10 votes during the day phase.
ach_sheep_mentality_100_desc: Cast 100 votes during the day phase.
ach_sheep_mentality_500_desc: Cast 500 votes during the day phase.
ach_sheep_mentality_1000_desc: Cast 1000 votes during the day phase.
ach_voted_against_10_desc: Receive 10 votes against you during the day phase.
ach_voted_against_50_desc: Receive 50 votes against you during the day phase.
ach_voted_against_100_desc: Receive 100 votes against you during the day phase.
ach_scapegoat_1_desc: Get voted out (lynched) for the first time.
ach_survivor_1_desc: Survive until the end of the game for the first time.
ach_survivor_25_desc: Survive until the end of the game 25 times.
ach_survivor_50_desc: Survive until the end of the game 50 times.
ach_survivor_100_desc: Survive until the end of the game 100 times.
ach_saved_1_desc: Be saved by a protection when attacked at night.
ach_saved_5_desc: Be saved by a protection 5 times.
ach_saved_10_desc: Be saved by a protection 10 times.
ach_first_die_10_desc: Be the first person to die in 10 different games.
ach_first_die_25_desc: Be the first person to die in 25 different games. Truly unfortunate.
ach_serpent_win_1_desc: Win a game as the Hypnotic Serpent.
ach_serpent_win_5_desc: Win 5 games as the Hypnotic Serpent.
ach_serpent_win_10_desc: Win 10 games as the Hypnotic Serpent.
ach_jaguar_win_1_desc: Win a game as the Lone Jaguar.
ach_jaguar_win_5_desc: Win 5 games as the Lone Jaguar.
ach_jaguar_win_10_desc: Win 10 games as the Lone Jaguar.
ach_possum_prank_5_desc: Trick the village into voting you out 5 times as the Possum.
ach_possum_prank_10_desc: Trick the village into voting you out 10 times as the Possum.
ach_love_conquers_5_desc: Win the game 5 times as a Lover.
ach_love_conquers_10_desc: Win the game 10 times as a Lover.
ach_speedrunner_desc: Finish a game in under 3 minutes.
ach_marathon_desc: Survive a game that lasts over 30 minutes.
ach_pacifist_village_desc: Win with The Herd without a single person getting lynched all game.
ach_close_call_desc: Survive the game with only you and 1 other person left alive.
ach_lone_survivor_desc: Be the ONLY player left alive at the end of the game.
ach_ghost_desc: Survive the entire game without casting a single vote.
ach_delayed_death_desc: Be saved by a protection at night, but still die later in the game.
